cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the company's flexible work arrangements and generous leave policies.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff members highlight competitive benefits and perks as a major advantage of working at the firm.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees feel valued and report clear paths for career advancement and skill development.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: A collaborative and inclusive environment is noted by many, though some report negative team dynamics.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees express high trust in the company's fairness, while others report a toxic atmosphere.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of the workforce reports feeling underpaid and exhausted by high-pressure workloads.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report that the reality of their workload contradicts the company's stated flexibility.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Concerns regarding limited career growth and perceived favoritism are present in some reviews.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: While many enjoy the culture, some report feeling isolated or experiencing high-stress environments.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Serious allegations of unethical management, discrimination, and bullying appear in a minority of reviews.
